body:
As the feed does whatever it is the feed does, I find myself looking at many posts of kittens lately and adding them to the queue, and then, whenever they start actually posting, (I’ve got a lot queued lol.) I envision this weird scenario where there’s like 6 cute kitten posts in a row and smack dab in the middle a loooooooong piece of smut like the one I posted earlier. It feels odd, but I guess ultimately it’s just weird aesthetically in my brain. ~shrugs~

But yeah, I wrote another one, so I wonder if the feed is not showing it much because it’s so long or something. It was a bit experimental. Definitely different than what I usually post. But I kinda thought I’d push some boundaries with it and I really liked the way it came out.
